article.body_preview:
DHAKA - Bangladesh Bank (BB) today announced 'cautiously accommodative' Monetary Policy Statement (MPS) for the second half of the current fiscal year 2022-23 (H2FY23).

"BB's monetary and credit programs for H2FY23 will pursue a cautiously accommodative policy stance to contain inflationary and exchange rate pressures, support desired economic growth, ensuring the necessary flow of funds to the economy's productive and employment generating activities," said BB Governor Abdur Rouf Talukder whil

llm_connections.evidence_quote: pursue a cautiously accommodative policy stance to contain inflationary and exchange rate pressures
llm_connections.scope_justification: This is a Bangladesh Bank national policy statement explicitly targeting 'exchange rate pressures', matching the country-level exchange rate volatility described by currency_log_return.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: promote import-substituting economic activities and dissuade imports of non-essential commodities to reduce the exchange rate pressure
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article describes a national policy to 'reduce the exchange rate pressure' by discouraging non-essential imports, addressing aggregate exchange rate pressure consistent with currency_log_return.
